creator: florent@peterschmitt.fr
text:
multimedia/livemedia has been updated and breaks build.

This patch should work out of the box:

https://projects.archlinux.org/svntogit/packages.git/tree/trunk/vlc-2.0.8-Fix-live555-breakage-in-last-update.patch?h=packages/vlc

Fix: 

https://projects.archlinux.org/svntogit/packages.git/tree/trunk/vlc-2.0.8-Fix-live555-breakage-in-last-update.patch?h=packages/vlc
